findings.34_water_frequency_hierarchy: 6 decades (GHz to PHz), same logarithmic architecture
findings.35_grotthuss_speed: 187 m/s proton hopping — enzyme timescale reaches cell diameter (200um)
findings.36_debye_screening: lambda_D = 0.81 nm, SCPN step maps to 0.24 nm
findings.38_H_bond_energy: 7.5 kBT — collectively ordered despite individual turnover

interpretation: Water implements K_nm coupling via H-bond network oscillations, Grotthuss phase transport, and Debye screening. Proton hopping provides physical wire for coupling across biological length scales.
